topic: The crawlspace under a house is furnished like a lived-in living room the owner never set up.
title: Someone Furnished My Crawlspace | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The crawlspace under my house is furnished like a living room I never built.
scenes.image_prompt: a low crawlspace beneath a house with a sofa and lamp arranged in the dirt, dim flashlight beam, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is eighteen inches of dirt and pipes. You crawl on your belly.
scenes.image_prompt: a tight dark crawlspace entrance with exposed pipes and bare soil, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I only went down to check for a leak.
scenes.image_prompt: a flashlight pointing into a dark crawlspace hatch in a floor, dim hallway, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My light caught the leg of an armchair where there should be none.
scenes.image_prompt: a flashlight beam finding an upholstered armchair leg in a dirt crawlspace, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then a rug. A side table. A lamp, switched on.
scenes.image_prompt: a glowing lamp on a small table beside a rug in a cramped crawlspace, deep shadow around it, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The ceiling down there was eight feet high. My floor sat right above me.
scenes.image_prompt: an impossibly tall furnished room below a house floor joists, lamp light, fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I crawled closer. The cushions were warm. The lamp bulb was hot.
scenes.image_prompt: a worn sofa with depressed cushions in a dim underground room, warm lamp glow, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A coffee mug sat steaming on the table.
scenes.image_prompt: a ceramic mug with rising steam on a side table in a dark underground living room, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the wall hung photographs of my own house, taken from inside that room.
scenes.image_prompt: framed photos on a dim wall showing a house interior, hung in an underground space, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One photo showed me, asleep upstairs, taken last night.
scenes.image_prompt: a single framed photograph on a dark wall showing a person asleep in a bed, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I scrambled out and sealed the hatch with screws.
scenes.image_prompt: a wooden crawlspace hatch screwed shut into a floor, dim hallway light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every night now I hear a lamp click on directly beneath my bed.
scenes.image_prompt: a bedroom floor at night with faint warm light leaking up through a crawlspace seam, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
